# Faculty and APP Phone Numbers

Faculty

Ameli 407-489-7679

Armstrong 443-613-2469

Bonnell 801-815-5000

Bruzzone 708-790-5822

Buchowicz 475-227-9832

Burks 352-562-2450

Burns 847-644-3561

Busl 617-820-9858

Carneiro 857-930-9914

Cibula 352-642-2645

Da Silva 312-722-7582

Eisenschenk 352-262-9114

Fanty 281-460-5679

FitzGerald 352-283-2000

Ford 239-877-6252

Hess 718-986-3297

Jaffee 210-316-6753

Kalamangalam 713-805-7148

Khanna 732-742-5666

Maciel 917-355-2504

Malaty 352-682-3718

McFarland, N 352-327-1359

Montalvo 401-316-0906

Nadeau 352-514-5611

Okun 352-262-6314

Orlova 732-979-1757

Patel 317-869-5656

Patterson 937-467-9119

Peng 617-599-5602

Pizzi 850-559-4402

Ramirez-Zamora 312-972-3475

Rawls 352-422-6361

Rempe 929-284-8052

Roach 352-222-7730

Robinson 304-646-4613

Roth 847-322-2557

Ruffing 941-809-0658

Shuhaiber 312-286-1059

Shukla 501-213-6201

Singh 301-538-5096

Solomon 910-315-9595

Subramony 601-750-1605

Tholanikunnel 843-834-0751

Triggs 352-262-8690

Wang 203-843-8250

Weisbrod 585-301-5236

Wilson 215-820-5120

Wong 424-237-5446

Wymer 518-928-2065

Yehya 614-804-8054

Inpatient APPs

Holder (Stroke) 352-494-6924 Ng (Stroke) 813-334-4190

Kenworthy (Stroke) 352-682-9365 Purtlebaugh (Stroke) 352-339-1741
